dj_text: If Game of Thrones Main Theme - Medieval Style was a warmup, Unknown is the main event. If Game of Thrones Main Theme - Medieval Style was the main event, Unknown is the hangover.
commercial_text: Hey, are you tired of being ignored by your fellow humans because they're always on their phones?
